data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of the AlarmDecoder device that is connected to your alarm panel.
data_description.port: The port on which AlarmDecoder is accessible (for example, 10000)

init.title: Configure AlarmDecoder
init.description: What would you like to edit?

data_description.alarm_code: User code for chime toggle and other panel functions
data_description.scan_panel: Scan the alarm panel using AUI to automatically detect and add zones. This will take a few minutes and requires AUI support.
data_description.notify_arm: Send push notification when system is armed
data_description.notify_disarm: Send push notification when system is disarmed
data_description.notify_trigger: Send push notification when alarm is triggered

zone_select.title: [%key:component::custom_alarmdecoder::options::step::init::title%]
zone_select.description: Enter the zone number you'd like to to add, edit, or remove.

zone_details.title: [%key:component::custom_alarmdecoder::options::step::init::title%]
zone_details.description: Enter details for zone {zone_number}. To delete zone {zone_number}, leave 'Zone name' blank.

error.relay_inclusive: 'Relay address' and 'Relay channel' are codependent and must be included together.
error.int: The field below must be an integer.
error.invalid_keypads: Invalid keypad addresses. Use comma-separated numbers (e.g. 16,17,18).
error.loop_rfid: 'RF loop' cannot be used without 'RF serial'.
error.loop_range: 'RF loop' must be an integer between 1 and 4.

alarm_keypress.name: Key press
alarm_keypress.description: Sends custom keypresses to the alarm.

keypress.name: [%key:component::custom_alarmdecoder::services::alarm_keypress::name%]
keypress.description: String to send to the alarm panel.

alarm_toggle_chime.name: Toggle chime
alarm_toggle_chime.description: Sends the alarm the toggle chime command.

code.name: Code
code.description: Code to toggle the alarm control panel chime with.
